market_sentiment.summary: 資料更新中，請稍後再試

articles.title: Crypto Biz: When dollars disappear, stablecoins step in
articles.description: Bolivia moves to recognize USDT amid a dollar shortage, while Bitcoin miners’ AI ambitions face fresh investor scrutiny.

articles.title: Nuclear startup Valar Atomics in talks to raise new funding at $6B valuation
articles.description: The potential deal highlights a growing trend of complex, multi-stage funding rounds that mask true entry prices.

articles.title: Polymarket traders cut Clarity Act passage odds to record low as Senate delay drags on
articles.description: Polymarket bettors have cut the odds of the CLARITY Act passing this year to a record low as Senate negotiations over ethics provisions remain unresolved.

articles.title: How Apple’s big lawsuit could disrupt OpenAI’s IPO plans
articles.description: Apple filed a trade secrets lawsuit against OpenAI last Friday, and it’s not messing around. The complaint alleges a pattern of misconduct reaching all the way up to OpenAI’s chief hardware officer and claims more than 400 former Apple employees now work at the c

articles.title: Stripe and Swift race to control the next generation of global payments infrastructure
articles.description: Crypto and blockchain experts say this week's moves show the two established finance companies are increasingly competing for control of the infrastructure behind digital payments.

articles.title: OKX Europe lets users convert USDT to MiCA-compliant USDC
articles.description: The feature offers European customers a voluntary path away from Tether’s USDT as MiCA rules reshape the region’s stablecoin market.

articles.title: Senator Warren requests 2026 reporting for Trump’s crypto earnings after $1.4B disclosure
articles.description: With the Senate likely voting on a crypto bill within days, Elizabeth Warren asked for information on Donald Trump’s earnings between January and July ahead of a 2027 deadline.

articles.title: Cardano hands core development to outside teams in decentralization push
articles.description: Input Output will transfer control of the Haskell node, Plutus, Hydra and other components as founder Charles Hoskinson says the network must change and start growing again.

articles.title: FBI arrests man accused of using Steam games to drain victims’ crypto wallets
articles.description: Prosecutors accused 21-year-old student Zyaire Wilkins of publishing on Steam several fake video games that contained malware, infecting thousands of victims, and stealing crypto from some of them.

articles.title: 解開宇宙燈塔之謎，NASA 探測器首度成功測量脈衝星磁場
articles.description: 近日科學家利用 NASA 的 X 射線成像偏振探測器（IXPE），首度成功直接測量「燈塔星雲」（Lightho […]

articles.title: 最新研究運用「光回波」精準測距，證實銀河系螺旋臂比預期更遙遠
articles.description: 透過觀測宇宙中最劇烈爆炸所產生的光線，在銀河系螺旋臂塵埃雲中折射出的反射現象，天文學家發現，我們的銀河系範圍可 […]

articles.title: Inside Robinhood’s high-stakes bet to onboard 10 million casual users onto decentralized finance
articles.description: The company says its advantage lies in bringing retail customers onchain, but early activity remains dominated by memecoins, while its original tokenization vision remains small.

articles.title: Amazon fixing bug that billed some AWS customers billions of dollars
articles.description: Some Amazon customers logged on Friday to a surprise bill estimate claiming that they owed the tech and cloud giant billions in fees.

articles.title: Patreon stops asking AI bots not to scrape — and starts blocking them
articles.description: Patreon is strengthening its defenses against AI scraping by working with Cloudflare to block bots that train AI models on creators’ content without permission. The move marks a shift away from relying on websites using robots.txt alone to actively block unauthorized AI training.

articles.title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
articles.description: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.

articles.title: No product? No problem. This Disrupt 2026 session shows how to get pre-seed funding with conviction, storytelling
articles.description: It’s not just you: AI startups are taking in a huge amount of seed funding, and in the process making things harder for anyone looking for funding even at a pre-seed stage. We’ve covered the trend in detail, and at this year’s TechCrunch Disrupt event, we want to help pre-seed founders now being hel

articles.title: 延續亞股下跌走勢，美股開盤持續走低考驗投資人信心
articles.description: 由於投資人持續對AI帶動的市場漲勢進行重新評估，引發半導體類股大範圍拋售，就在亞洲個股紛紛走跌之後，加上中東地 […]

articles.title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
articles.description: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

articles.title: Pat Gelsinger 持續示警晶片對台灣依賴風險，還指英特爾該讓有技術背景者領導
articles.description: 英特爾（Intel）前執行長Pat Gelsinger近期對全球過度依賴台灣晶片供應提出嚴厲警告。他表示，在中 […]

articles.title: Japan's SBI Group is building Asia's first cross-border digital asset empire
articles.description: The securities giant announced today the consolidation of Singapore-based Coinhako as part of a rapid regional expansion that includes a tokenization partnership with Ondo Finance.
